heading: Returns by certain trusts
label: 6034 Returns by certain trusts
notes: Amendments2006—, which directed the general amendment of section 6034 without specifying the act to be amended, was executed to this section, which is section 6034 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986, to reflect the probable intent of Congress. Prior to amendment, this section consisted of subsecs. (a) to (c) stating a general rule requiring certain trusts to furnish information as the Secretary may by forms and regulations prescribe, allowing for exceptions to the rule, and providing a cross reference relating to penalties for failure to file a return.Pub. L. 109–2801986—Subsec. (c). substituted “section 6652(c)” for “section 6652(d)”.Pub. L. 99–5141980—, substituted “section 4947(a)(2)” for “section 4947(a)” in section catchline.Pub. L. 96–603, § 1(d)(1)(D)Subsec. (a). , substituted “section 4947(a)(2)” for “section 4947(a)”.Pub. L. 96–603, § 1(d)(1)(A)Subsec. (b). , (C), substituted in heading “Exceptions” for “Exception” and in text inserted provision that this section not apply in the case of a trust described in section 4947(a)(1).Pub. L. 96–603, § 1(d)(1)(B)1976—Subsec. (a). struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–4551969—Subsec. (a). , (33), inserted, in section catchline and in subsec. (a), reference to trusts described in section 4947(a), and, in par. (1), struck out provisions requiring the separate showing of the amount of deduction paid out, and the amount permanently set aside for charitable, etc., purposes.Pub. L. 91–172, § 101(j)(32)Subsec. (c). , added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 91–172, § 101(j)(34)

Effective Date of 2006 Amendment, , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–280, title XII, § 1201(c)(2)120 Stat. 1066Aug. 17, 2006“The amendments made by subsection (b) [amending this section and sections 6104 and 6652 of this title] shall apply to returns for taxable years beginning after .”December 31, 2006

Effective Date of 1986 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to returns the due date for which (determined without regard to extensions) is after , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 99–514section 1501(e) of Pub. L. 99–514section 6721 of this titleDec. 31, 1986

Effective Date of 1980 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to taxable years beginning after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 96–603section 1(f) of Pub. L. 96–603section 6033 of this titleDec. 31, 1980

Effective Date of 1969 AmendmentAmendment by applicable to taxable years beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date note under .Pub. L. 91–172section 101(k)(2)(B) of Pub. L. 91–172section 4940 of this titleDec. 31, 1969

children.heading: Split-interest trusts
children.label: a Split-interest trusts
children.text: Every trust described in section 4947(a)(2) shall furnish such information with respect to the taxable year as the Secretary may by forms or regulations require.

children.heading: Trusts claiming certain charitable deductions
children.label: b Trusts claiming certain charitable deductions
A
children.text: the amount of the deduction taken under section 642(c) within such year,

children.label: B
children.text: the amount paid out within such year which represents amounts for which deductions under section 642(c) have been taken in prior years,

children.label: C
children.text: the amount for which such deductions have been taken in prior years but which has not been paid out at the beginning of such year,

children.label: D
children.text: the amount paid out of principal in the current and prior years for the purposes described in section 642(c),

children.label: E
children.text: the total income of the trust within such year and the expenses attributable thereto, and

children.label: F
children.text: a balance sheet showing the assets, liabilities, and net worth of the trust as of the beginning of such year.

children.label: A
children.text: all the net income for such year, determined under the applicable principles of the law of trusts, is required to be distributed currently to the beneficiaries, or

children.label: B
children.text: the trust is described in section 4947(a)(1).
